versions.version_description: This is the way Tom Petty played it. Includes chord legend, all breaks and backing vocals, and link to video. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1lWJXDG2i0A.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Free Fallin' chords
Tom Petty 1989 (Full Moon Fever album)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_Fallin%27

Capo III (or Rickenbacker 12 string)

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x2

She’s a good girl, loves her mama[/tab]

loves Je-sus and America too[/tab]

loves hors-es and her boy   friend too[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
there’s a free-way   runnin’ through the yard[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]        [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
and I’m a bad boy, cause I don’t even miss her[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I’m a bad boy for breakin’ her heart[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] *

move west down   Ventura Boulevard[/tab]
